name: TrinityDLP
description: Trinity-built Data Loss Prevention system. Scans files for sensitive data patterns, monitors file integrity, auto-recovers compromised files.
author: Victory + Trinity

tools.name: dlp_scan
tools.description: Scan a file for sensitive data patterns (passwords, keys, tokens)

tools.name: dlp_hash
tools.description: Generate SHA256 hash of a file for integrity baseline

tools.name: dlp_status
tools.description: DLP system status and recent events
